svg.text: Eight species. No enclosed gap anywhere: every notch is a 60 degree open wedge, so the 40 unit halo fills only its vertex.
SIZE LADDER = frame1 at 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 and frame2 at 64. Judge here, not at 4x.
ALL EIGHT SILHOUETTES = the collision test. Row 1 at 32, row 2 at 18, then frame 2 at 32.
order: humanoid, gollumer, mechtron, packer, leggite, bonzoid, spheroid, flapper
DOCK BADGE = head crops at 18 px square (what the auction dock actually draws), and at 44 for inspection.
FOUR PLAYER COLORS x THREE BACKGROUNDS, every species at 32 px (true game size).
terrain #7c9a4e (the hard case: green player on green ground is the third block)
4x INSPECTION = 80 x 128. Editing aid only. Nothing is approved from this row.
mechtron torso 104 wide (floor 96). leggite core column 38 (ceiling 60). bonzoid waist 48 (ceiling 70). flapper torso 56 (ceiling 60).
all six leggite legs are 68 long and 28 thick in both frames. only the angles change. bonzoid fists r=34 are bigger than its head r=25.
